sources.title: AI companion apps on track to pull in $120M in 2025
sources.claim: Mobile AI companion apps on track for $120M revenue in 2025; downloads up 88% YoY in H1 2025; revenue up 64% YoY; revenue per download grew from $0.52 (2024) to $1.18 (2025)

sources.title: AI Companion Market Growth 2026–2034 | Trends by Type & Use
sources.claim: Global AI companion market valued at $37.73B in 2025; projected to grow from $49.52B (2026) to $435.9B by 2034 at 31.24% CAGR

sources.title: AI Companion Market Size to Hit USD 552.49 Billion by 2035
sources.claim: Global AI companion market at $37.12B (2025), growing to $48.63B (2026) and $552.49B by 2035 at 31.00% CAGR

sources.title: AI Companion Market Size And Share | Industry Report, 2030
sources.claim: Global AI companion market at $36.79B (2025) growing at 33.8% CAGR; North America holds 41% market share; APAC holds 32%

sources.title: AI Companions Statistics By Usage, Market Size, Apps and Facts (2025)
sources.claim: Xiaoice: 660M users; Snapchat My AI: 150M users; Character.AI: 233M registered users; cumulative global downloads: 220M as of July 2025; consumer spending: $221M as of July 2025; top 10% of apps capture 89% of revenue

sources.title: Working Paper 24-078: AI Companions Reduce Loneliness
sources.claim: Controlled study confirms AI companions measurably reduce loneliness; people with fewer human relationships more likely to seek AI companions; companionship and therapy are top two stated use cases

sources.title: Many teens are turning to AI chatbots for friendship and emotional support
sources.claim: Gen Z digital-native teens using AI chatbots for friendship; 57% of Character.AI users aged 18–24; 80% of Gen Z open to AI relationships; 17–24% of adolescents develop problematic AI dependencies

sources.title: AI Companions Hit 50M Users: Valentine's Day 2026
sources.claim: AI companion apps crossed 50M active users globally in February 2026; $500M+ annual revenue across category in 2026; Replika leads with 20M users

sources.title: AI Companion Apps Crossed 20M in Revenue. April 2026 Market Breakdown.
sources.claim: 5 US states passed AI companion laws in Q1 2026; UnitedHealthcare deployed AI companion for 20.5M members (April 2026); number of competing platforms grew 38% in 2025; 128 new apps launched in 2025; enterprise AI companions emerging as distinct market

sources.title: Loneliness is Driving Adoption of AI Companions
sources.claim: 61% of people aged 18–25 report serious loneliness; loneliness epidemic is the primary structural driver of AI companion adoption; AI companion app count grew 700% between 2022 and mid-2025

sources.title: 2026 Year in Preview: AI Regulatory Developments for Companies to Watch Out For
sources.claim: New York AI Companion Law requires crisis-response protocols for self-harm; Tennessee developer liability for emotional harm to minors; EU AI Act fully applicable August 2026; GDPR Article 9 applies to emotional/psychological data

sources.title: AI companions and subjective well-being: Moderation by social connectedness and loneliness
sources.claim: Heavy emotional self-disclosure to AI consistently associated with lower well-being; Dartmouth Therabot RCT found 51% drop in depressive symptoms, 31% drop in anxiety, 19% drop in body image concerns

unverified_claims.note: Estimated based on Q4 2025 to Q1 2026 trajectory; no verified quarterly breakdown available for this specific period

unverified_claims.claim: Annual retention rate of 80%+ for users with 90+ day streaks
unverified_claims.note: Industry estimate based on category behavior patterns; no single verified source for this specific figure

unverified_claims.claim: Microsoft acquisition of Inflection AI at $650M
unverified_claims.note: Widely reported figure but structured as talent+license deal; exact valuation disputed; verify against March 2024 sources before publishing
